"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const routerGenerator = require("@tanstack/router-generator"); async function generate(config, root) { try { const generator = new routerGenerator.Generator({ config, root }); await generator.run(); process.exit(0); } catch (err) { console.error(err); process.exit(1); } } exports.generate = generate; //# sourceMappingURL=generate.cjs.map
